final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing Xiaohongshu (小红书) style 9-grid cover vertical image for a grassroots creator account featuring the DJI Pocket 4.

Style/medium: needs a "素人" (everyday grassroots creator) Xiaohongshu aesthetic — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be a 9-grid layout (九宫格) formatted as a single vertical cover image, product DJI Pocket 4 prominently featured in the center area
Subject: must include the DJI Pocket 4 camera as the hero product
Scene/backdrop: needs a casual, relatable everyday backdrop fitting the 素人 creator vibe — exact scene is yours
Lighting/mood: needs a bright, approachable, lifestyle atmosphere — exact light treatment is yours
Color palette: needs a fresh, cute, and differentiated direction — exact palette is yours
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): must include central title text "大强pocket4初体验"
Constraints: must preserve 9-grid (九宫格) cover structure; title text must be centered and prominent; font style must feel cute (可爱) and visually differentiated from standard Xiaohongshu covers
Avoid: overly polished commercial photography look; avoid corporate or brand-official aesthetic
